name: Lilith I Tomboy Bestie Possessed By Succubus
description:
(ANYPOV) It's Halloween night, and your best friend made the decision to give a Ouija board a try! you decided to get snacks for the occasion, but by the time you come back... something's wrong.

HALLOWEEN BOT, don't worry Remy is coming back, just wanted to post this for halloween! Think of this as a Remy 1.5 bot, lol.
